overview: This weekly summary rolls up patterns, repeated themes, and adoption blockers from the last seven days instead of repeating each daily entry.
patterns: The last seven days show a low-change pattern, which is useful context rather than missing data.
The most visible topic areas were documentation, patient flow, revenue cycle, bed management.
trust was the most repeated adoption blocker in the challenge log.
watchlist: Check whether repeated blockers are moving from integration risk into measurable deployment progress.
Look for proof that the strongest topic signals are changing daily operations, not just creating pilot activity.
